ocr_findings.note: Header garbled '試験にはつしが出る！' (should be '試験にここが出る！'); cosmetic, not propagated to output.
IaaS heading captured as '0.00 laaS' + furigana 'ライアース' on separate line; downstream cleaner recovered to 'IaaS' correctly.

translation_findings.note: ホスティングサービス section in zh renders body '...所在地不明确' but JP source says '所在が明確'. Cloud's body (block_3) appears to have overwritten Hosting's body in zh output — Hosting's actual zh definition (所在地明确) is LOST. Combined with duplicate header '主机托管服务' (lines 37 & 41) shared by ハウジング and ホスティング, zh readers cannot disambiguate two distinct concepts AND see wrong content. EN preserves Housing/Hosting + clear/unclear correctly.
translation_findings.fix: Distinguish zh surface: ハウジング→'机房托管服务/机柜托管服务', ホスティング→'主机租用服务/服务器托管服务'. Re-verify zh definition for ホスティング renders '所在地明确' from translated JSON block_2.
